name: Saffron Farmers in Hardship
description: Direct relief for smallholder farming families who fell below the nisab after a failed harvest.

name: Widows & Orphans Fund — Mashhad
description: Monthly essentials for households with no breadwinner.

name: Debt Relief Circle
description: Clears urgent, interest-free debts for people who cannot repay.

name: Stranded Travellers Aid
description: Shelter and passage home for travellers cut off from their means.

name: New Muslim Support
description: Settling-in support and community for recent converts.

name: Skills & Livelihood Grants
description: Tools and training so families can earn above the nisab next year.
